Everything you need to win at dating

From profile optimization to conversation coaching — RizzAI covers your entire dating funnel.

AI Profile Analyzer

Get your dating profile scored across 8 dimensions. Discover why you're not getting matches and exactly how to fix it.

Conversation Wingman

Paste any chat and get 3 tailored reply suggestions in under 10 seconds. Soft, Hard, or Extreme mode — your choice.

Screenshot Intelligence

Upload chat screenshots. Our AI reads emotions, detects ghosting probability, and tells you where you stand.

How it works

From awkward to awesome in 30 seconds.

1

Upload your profile or paste a conversation

Takes 10 seconds. No judgment.

2

AI analyzes in real-time

Scores, insights, and reply suggestions generated instantly.

3

Copy, paste, and get more dates

Use the suggestions directly in your dating apps.
